name: LitePanels Studio X2
comment: The Studio X2 Bi-Color 60W Fresnel has a 5” lens in a practical compact chassis with a spot-to-flood beam angle range of 10° - 49°. With a maximum output of 2,300 lux at 10ft/3m (spot 5,600K), its output at 3,200K is similar to a 300W traditional tungsten Fresnel. Advanced thermal management ensures 50,000+ hours of LED engine life, while individual burn-in and calibration tests ensure quality and consistency.
